title: bulbophyllum manipurense
intro: Bulbophyllum manipurense, also known as Manipuri Bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid native to the northeastern regions of India and the Himalayas. It is an epiphytic orchid that grows on trees and has medicinal properties, with its rhizomes and stems being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
